display_name_sources: source_facts.name is open-sp; source_facts.source-archive uses the OpenSP release name.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official OpenJade/OpenSP homepage and best supplied documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; source_facts.homepage and source_facts.source-archive identify official OpenSP releases but no official source-control repository URL was available from supplied official fields.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says SGML parser; source_facts.executables lists onsgmls, osgmlnorm, and related SGML tools.
